name: pipeline
description: Autonomous feature development pipeline: assess current state, research context, generate execution prompts with dependency ordering, adversarial review (with ambiguity surfacing), orchestrate concurrent worktree execution with review-fix loops and surgical-change discipline, and deliver clean branches

skills.name: Pre-Plan Assessment
skills.description: Reviews current codebase state and UX before planning changes, producing Current State and UX reports

skills.name: DM Research Orchestrator
skills.description: Gathers context from ai-memory, RAG, web search, and DM domain plugins for feature planning

skills.name: Execution Prompt Generator
skills.description: Takes a plan and generates self-contained execution prompts with overlap-aware dependency ordering and manifest

agents.name: Plan Adversary
agents.description: Adversarially reviews plans and execution prompts for feasibility, completeness, and DM standards, iterating to convergence

agents.name: Execution Orchestrator
agents.description: Autonomously executes sub-prompts in worktrees with dm-review-loop review-fix loops and zero-deferral policy

commands.name: Pipeline
commands.description: Full autonomous pipeline: assess, research, plan, prompt, review, execute, deliver

commands.name: Pipeline Assess
commands.description: Pre-plan assessment of current codebase and UX state

commands.name: Pipeline Prompts
commands.description: Generate execution prompts from an existing plan with overlap analysis

commands.name: Pipeline Run
commands.description: Execute generated prompts in worktrees with review-fix loops

commands.name: Pipeline Fix-Pass
commands.description: Fix-pass pipeline: consumes numbered findings, reuses the current branch, enforces before/after baselines
